dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4408 IS: Supporting Energy and Economic Development (SEED) Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Blackburn introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to extend biodiesel and renewable diesel incentives, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Supporting Energy and Economic Development (SEED) Act.

section.header: Extension of biodiesel and renewable diesel incentives

paragraph.header: Extension of biodiesel mixture credit and biodiesel credit
paragraph.text: Section 40A(g) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking shall not apply to any sale or use after December 31, 2024 (or, in the case and inserting
by striking ). at the end and inserting

paragraph.text: in any other case, any sale or use—

subparagraph.text: after December 31, 2024, and before the date of the enactment of the Supporting Energy and Economic Development (SEED) Act, or
Section 40A(c) of such Code is amended—

clause.text: by striking The amount and inserting the following:
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: In the case of any fuel with respect to which a credit is allowed under section 45Z(a) for any taxable year, the amount determined under this section with respect to such fuel shall be zero.

paragraph.header: Credit for fuels used for taxable purposes

subparagraph.text: Section 6426(c)(6) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking for any period after December 31, 2024. and inserting
after December 31, 2024, and before the date of the enactment of the Supporting Energy and Economic Development (SEED) Act , or
Section 45Z(f) of such Code is amended by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

paragraph.header: Coordination with excise tax credit for biodiesel mixtures
paragraph.text: No credit shall be allowed under this section for any fuel if a credit is allowed with respect to such fuel by reason of the application of section 6426(c) or 6427(e).

paragraph.header: Payments for fuels not used for taxable purposes
paragraph.text: Section 6427(e)(6)(B) of such Code is amended by striking sold or used after December 31, 2024, and inserting

clause.text: after December 31, 2024, and before the date of the enactment of the Supporting Energy and Economic Development (SEED) Act , or

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to fuel sold or used on or after the date of the enactment of this Act.
